hero.title: Precision for Demanding Industry
hero.subtitle: Inexxio AG develops and manufactures high-precision machine components and assemblies for industry. From design to delivery – everything from one source.

features.title: Our Core Competencies
features.subtitle: Precision, quality and reliability – the values that distinguish us.

manufacturing.title: Precision Manufacturing
manufacturing.desc: CNC machining with tolerances down to 0.001 mm. Highest quality for the most demanding requirements.

engineering.title: Engineering & Design
engineering.desc: From concept to series production – we accompany you through the entire development process.

solutions.title: Complete Solutions
solutions.desc: Individual parts, assemblies and complete system solutions – all from one source, delivered on time.

quality.title: Swiss Quality Guarantee
quality.desc: ISO 9001-certified processes ensure consistently high quality with every delivery.

flexibility.title: Flexible and Scalable
flexibility.desc: From one-off pieces to large series – we adapt to your requirements.

reliability.title: Reliable Partnership
reliability.desc: Transparent communication, clear deadlines and uncompromising quality.

innovation.title: Modern Manufacturing Technology
innovation.desc: Latest CNC technology combined with years of experience in mechanical engineering.

cta.title: Ready for a Non-binding Conversation?
cta.subtitle: Contact us – we will find the optimal solution for your requirements.

mission.title: Our Mission
mission.desc: Inexxio AG stands for the highest precision in the manufacturing and development of machine components. As a Swiss company, we are committed to quality, reliability and sustainable partnerships with our customers.

quality.title: Quality
quality.desc: Uncompromising quality at every production step.

contact.title: Contact
contact.subtitle: We look forward to your enquiry. Our team usually responds within 24 hours.
